rules.rule_text:
title: Azure Application Deleted
id: 410d2a41-1e6d-452f-85e5-abdd8257a823
status: test
description: Identifies when a application is deleted in Azure.
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity/monitoring-health/reference-audit-activities#application-proxy
author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
date: 2021-09-03
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.impact
- attack.t1489
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: activitylogs
detection:
  selection:
    properties.message:
    - Delete application
    - Hard Delete application
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Application being deleted may be performed by a system administrator.
- Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes
  in your environment.
- Application deleted from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior
  is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.
level: medium
